input.background: Of 75 patients in a follow-up study, 20 showed spontaneous improvement within a month.
input.question: Include a 95% confidence interval for the proportion.

number_of_patients.description: The total number of patients in the follow-up study.

number_of_improvements.description: The number of patients who showed spontaneous improvement within a month.

proportion_of_improvements.description: The proportion of patients who showed spontaneous improvement, which is the parameter of interest for the confidence interval.
